items.name: Ostrichsized Winter Scarf
items.description: What does it mean to be Ostrichsized?  Ostrichsized means kicking in the teeth of any man who chooses to fight a horse-sized duck over a hundred duck sized horses.  It means fighting robotic dinosaurs with a laser sword dipped in unicorn tears for fun.  It means wearing a scarf for a California winter.

items.name: Spec Gamma Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: In the aftermath of World War VII, isolated pockets of human survivors raided ruined government labs, looking specifically for these weapons. The Spec X program had been accelerated in the late 2120s as the prospect of an all out metahuman vs. machine war became increasingly likely. Prized for their ability to slice through viridian steel exoskeletons, the US was determined to find a substitute for the pure diamond required for the manufacture of the Beta models. Sapphire, while still exorbitantly expensive, allowed the army to produce blades that were 95% as effective as the Betas, at only 20% the cost.

items.name: Spec Beta Biograft Energy Sword
items.description: In 2113, decades after the initial release of the hugely successful Spec Alpha biograft energy weapons, the US government began research on a top-secret upgrade. The breakthrough was to use artificial diamonds to forge the blade itself, rather that carbon nanofibers. The new weapon was very effective, but obscenely expensive. Only a hundred were ever made.
